ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxons" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the taxon (e.g., non-phage/phage) */,
  "taxon_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the taxon in the classification hierarchy */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the taxon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the taxon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., NCBI Refseq) */,
  "source_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., database, repository) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxon_sources" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date when the taxon was sourced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "classification_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the classification in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxon_classifications" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the taxon was classified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id", "classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the taxon */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the taxon was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for access (e.g., research, education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxons ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon related to the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxons ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon being cited */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication citing the taxon */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxons ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "group_id")
)
column_names: Rank of the taxon in the classification hierarchy
Name of the source (e.g., NCBI Refseq)
Date when the taxon was sourced
Rank of the classification in the hierarchy
Date when the taxon was classified
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the taxon being accessed
ID of the user accessing the taxon
Date when the taxon was accessed
ID of the taxon related to the publication
ID of the taxon being cited
ID of the publication citing the taxon
Date when the user joined the group
